SEARCH
Package com.hotelreservation.reservation.repository

Interface ReservationRepository

All Superinterfaces:
org.springframework.data.repository.CrudRepository<Reservation,Long>, org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository<Reservation,Long>, org.springframework.data.repository.ListCrudRepository<Reservation,Long>, org.springframework.data.repository.ListPagingAndSortingRepository<Reservation,Long>, org.springframework.data.repository.PagingAndSortingRepository<Reservation,Long>, org.springframework.data.repository.query.QueryByExampleExecutor<Reservation>, org.springframework.data.repository.Repository<Reservation,Long>
public interface ReservationRepository extends org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository<Reservation,Long>
JPA repository for Reservation entity database operations.

Extends JpaRepository for standard CRUD operations and provides custom JPQL queries for user-specific retrieval and date-overlap detection.

This service stores room and user identity as plain columns (roomId, userId, etc.) rather than JPA relationships, since room and user data live in separate microservice databases and cannot be joined across services.

  • Method Details

    • findByUserIdOrderByCheckInDateDesc

      List<Reservation> findByUserIdOrderByCheckInDateDesc(Long userId)
      Retrieves all reservations for a given user, ordered by check-in date descending (most recent first).
      Parameters:
      userId - the primary key of the user whose reservations to fetch
      Returns:
      ordered list of the user's reservations; empty if none exist

    • existsOverlappingReservation

      @Query("SELECT COUNT(r) > 0 FROM Reservation r WHERE r.roomId = :roomId AND r.checkInDate < :checkOutDate AND r.checkOutDate > :checkInDate") boolean existsOverlappingReservation(@Param("roomId") Long roomId, @Param("checkInDate") LocalDate checkInDate, @Param("checkOutDate") LocalDate checkOutDate)
      Checks whether a conflicting reservation exists for the given room and date range.

      Overlap detection logic — two date ranges [A_start, A_end] and [B_start, B_end] overlap if and only if: 

         A_start < B_end  AND  A_end > B_start
      This single condition covers all overlap scenarios:
      • Partial overlap from either direction
      • Full containment (one range inside the other)
      • Exact date match
      Adjacent ranges (e.g. check-out on day X, check-in on day X) do NOT overlap, allowing back-to-back bookings for the same room.
      Parameters:
      roomId - the ID of the room to check for booking conflicts
      checkInDate - the requested check-in date (inclusive start)
      checkOutDate - the requested check-out date (exclusive end)
      Returns:
      true if a conflicting reservation exists; false if the room is free
